privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data created by the setup script to simulate an agronomy scouting report. All referenced agricultural entities are verified as real: Potato Leafhopper (Empoasca fabae) is a confirmed major agricultural pest affecting alfalfa. The pest count of 2.5 per sweep exceeds the standard economic threshold of 2.0 per sweep for 12-inch tall alfalfa, triggering treatment recommendations. Warrior II (lambda-cyhalothrin with Zeon Technology) is a real, EPA-registered restricted-use insecticide with a verified application rate of 1.92 fl oz/acre. The Restricted Entry Interval (REI) of 24 hours is verified from EPA label documentation for this product. The task requires creating an ODT document that includes this safety-critical REI value in bold formatting.
